questions: hater rekha dekhle ki bujha jay?
Which hand to read in palmistry?
What is the life line on hand?
answers: Palmistry is the art of reading the lines, shapes, and mounts on your palm to interpret personality traits and potential life events. The three main lines are heart, head, and life lines.
In palmistry, you look at the major lines on your palm: the heart line for emotions, head line for intellect, and life line for vitality. The dominant hand shows your current life path.
Palmistry ba hater rekha pora holo hater different lines deikhe personality ar bhobisshot bujhbar cheshta. Heart line, head line, ar life line holo main 3 ta rekha.

Palm reading involves studying the lines, mounts, and shapes of your hands. While not scientifically proven, it's an ancient practice spanning many cultures. The dominant hand is usually read for current life trends.
